zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy Turberville於大約1195年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特梅爾可姆 霍爾時，她的父親Robert de Turberville27歲，母親Isabella De'Carew18歲。她於1222年與Bishop Robert Bingham在英國英格蘭多瑟特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1246年在英國英格蘭享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Turberville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, probably from Thouberville (Eure), or possibly from Trubleville (Seine-Maritime), both in France. The two may have been confused in surname usage.

variants.name: Torbet
meanings: from the Anglo-Norman and Middle English personal name T(h)urbert, T(h)orbert, a hybrid of Old Norse Thorr ‘Thor’, the name of the god of thunder, + ancient Germanic -berht ‘bright, famous’. The name was probably formed on the Continent; see Turberville .
perhaps in some cases a nickname from Old French and Middle English turbot, turbut ‘turbot’, for someone who caught or sold or resembled this fish.

variants.name: Tuberville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Turberville  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Turville
meanings: English (Surrey and Hampshire; of Norman origin):
habitational name from Tourville‐la‐Campagne (Eure, France). The placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Thórr + Old French ville ‘farmstead, estate’ (from Latin villa).
occasionally a shortened form of   Turberville  .

variants.name: Troublefield
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Turberville  .

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy Turberville was born about 1195, in Melcombe Horsey, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Turberville, was 27 and her mother, Isabella De'Carew, was 18. She married Bishop Robert Bingham in 1222, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died about 1246, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy Turberville est née environ 1195, à Melcombe Horsey, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Turberville, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabella De'Carew, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Bishop Robert Bingham en 1222, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1246, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1222 in Dorset, England, United Kingdom Bishop Robert Bingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. ja.lifeSummary: Lucy Turbervilleが約1195年にイギリスイギリスドールセトメルコンベ ホールセイで生まれた時，父Robert de Turbervilleは27歳，母Isabella De'Carewは18歳であった。1222年にイギリスイギリスドールセトでBishop Robert Binghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1246年にイギリスイギリスで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Turberville(이)가 대략 1195년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 멜코브 호르시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Turberville(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella De'Carew(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1222년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 Bishop Robert Bingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1246년 영국 잉글랜드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Turberville nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Melcombe Horsey, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Turberville, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabella De'Carew, tinha 18 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy Turberville родилась около 1195 г. в местности мелкомб хаурси, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Turberville было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella De'Carew, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bishop Robert Bingham в 1222 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла около 1246 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.
